laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
rule: Cloud-only; trigger is dispatch, event, or event+dispatch only, no cron in v0; every line writes a receipt; founder approvals are structural gates, not conventions; preview never production; every line enters at assist_only
namespace_note: FL prefix mandatory. L1-L8 is already bound to three existing namespaces (machine autonomy loops in data/machine_autonomy_loops_v1.json, TrustField cloud ops lines in data/cloud_line_registry_v1.json, governance laws); factory lines use FL1-FL10 to avoid collision.

relationship.trustfield_ops_lines: data/cloud_line_registry_v1.json — untouched sibling registry (venture ops), not superseded

lines.name: Research Line
lines.input_source: order envelope (client_order_to_factory_run_v0) + compiled packet task spec (seven allowed keys only; soup wall). Read-only research — no repo mutation, so no sandbox worktree needed
lines.output_artifact: research_brief JSON + per-URL evidence (status + body sha256) under receipts/factory/artifacts/<FR-ID>/
lines.failure_behavior: Unverifiable sources dropped, never fabricated; degrade: tag confidence -> reduce scope -> partial brief tagged PARTIAL with limitations[] -> retry-if-ROI-positive -> review queue. Never STOP
lines.notes: CLOUD_RESEARCH discipline: one evidence artifact per URL claim. claude_cloud_agent path is dormant until founder wires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in GH Actions secrets (activation dependency, not a design assumption).

lines.name: Architecture Line
lines.input_source: order envelope + FL1 research_brief. Design-doc output only — writes to artifact dir, not the repo tree, so no sandbox worktree needed
lines.output_artifact: architecture_package (design docs + line_plan proposal + file-scope map) under receipts/factory/artifacts/<FR-ID>/
lines.failure_behavior: Missing inputs file a repair candidate, lane continues; degrade: reduce scope -> provisional package tagged PROVISIONAL -> retry-if-ROI-positive -> review queue. Never STOP
lines.notes: Downstream worker prompts assembled from its package carry ONLY the seven allowed task-spec keys (goal, files, constraints, done_criteria, verify_method, receipts_required, decision_verdict); P0 CORE judgment text never enters factory worker prompts (soup wall gate precedent scripts/verify_p0_core_output_soup_wall_gate_v1.py). session_embedded secondary obeys INCIDENT-039 light shell law.

lines.name: Code Line
lines.input_source: architecture_package + allocated sandbox worktree .worktrees/factory/<sandbox_id> on branch sandbox/factory/fr-NNNN(-slug)
lines.output_artifact: code_change_set: commits on sandbox/factory/* branch + draft PR; artifacts hashed under receipts/factory/artifacts/<FR-ID>/
lines.failure_behavior: Build/edit failure degrades: reduce scope -> partial change set tagged PARTIAL with limitations[] -> retry-if-ROI-positive -> review queue; timeout -> kill + PARTIAL receipt (partial beats lost). Never STOP
lines.notes: No direct main writes — repo fences + CODEOWNERS + W1 wall; sandbox exit runs boundary check (scripts/check_sandbox_walls_v0.py, TO BE BUILT in CF-P1, walls W1-W9). env_profile deny-by-default: no send-capable credentials in the sandbox.

lines.name: No-Code App Builder Line
lines.input_source: architecture_package + governed template stack (Railway service + Supabase schema + CF Pages/Worker front) in allocated sandbox worktree
lines.output_artifact: app_manifest: template-stack config + schema drafts + front-end draft on sandbox/factory/* branch; hashed under receipts/factory/artifacts/<FR-ID>/
lines.failure_behavior: Template-stack failure degrades: reduce scope -> manifest-only output tagged PARTIAL (no service creation) -> retry-if-ROI-positive -> review queue. Never STOP
founder_approval_points: production deploy of built app — FOUNDER_ONLY, absent from v0 substrate (CF-P4+)
lines.notes: Railway/Supabase are not yet motor kinds in data/github_automation_registry_v1.json — flag as registry amendment when built. Builds manifests and drafts only; deploys nothing.

lines.name: Workflow Builder Line
lines.input_source: architecture_package + prompt registry contract (data/prompt_registry_schema_v1.json) in allocated sandbox worktree
lines.output_artifact: workflow_definition: prompt registry row drafts (cf.* prompt_ids) + automation registry row drafts + GH Actions workflow YAML drafts on sandbox/factory/* branch
lines.failure_behavior: Contract-test failure blocks the new definition only; degrade: reduce scope -> draft-only output tagged PROVISIONAL -> retry-if-ROI-positive -> review queue. Never STOP
founder_approval_points: activation of any produced workflow definition — separate founder-gated step; no recurring automation without founder unlock (R3 locked)
lines.notes: prompt_id form cf.<line_key>.<name> requires extending pattern ^(tb|pa|ops)\. in data/prompt_registry_schema_v1.json — PROPOSED schema v2 amendment, founder-gated. This line produces drafts only; it never activates, schedules, or registers anything.

lines.name: Test Line
lines.input_source: sandbox/factory/* branch head (event: push to branch) or explicit dispatch with FR-ID; runs inside sandbox scope
lines.output_artifact: test_report: suite results + contract-test results + dry-run traces, uploaded as GH Actions artifact and hashed under receipts/factory/artifacts/<FR-ID>/
lines.failure_behavior: A failing test suite is a verdict, not a line failure — FAIL report still receipts; runner failure degrades: retry-if-ROI-positive -> partial report tagged PARTIAL -> review queue. Never STOP
lines.notes: Deterministic execution (no LLM). Merges to main always pass full repo fences; sandbox/factory/* is NOT fence-exempt in v0.

lines.name: Deploy-Preview Line
lines.input_source: tested sandbox/factory/* branch + FL6 test_report; runs in GH Actions on the pushed branch, no sandbox worktree needed
lines.output_artifact: preview_artifact: PR + GH Actions build artifact + optional preview URL; for Mode A a dry-run trace artifact
lines.failure_behavior: Preview build failure degrades: reduce scope -> logs-as-artifact PARTIAL receipt with limitations[] -> retry-if-ROI-positive -> review queue; never falls through to any production path. Never STOP
founder_approval_points: anything beyond preview — production promote is FOUNDER_ONLY via existing paths (HARD_BLOCK reason 2)
lines.notes: PREVIEW ONLY. Production deploy is NOT part of the substrate in v0 — no_deploy gate + HARD_BLOCK reason 2. Client approval gates their run's preview->deliver step; founder approval gates production. cloudflare_worker secondary is unusable in v0 under CF tool_law (Phase 3/4 control-plane deferral; v0 permits only the existing verifier read/verify path) — requires a PROPOSED founder-ratified amendment before use; github_actions is the only operable v0 preview path.

lines.name: Verifier Line
lines.input_source: preview_artifact URL/artifact refs + test_report (event: run reaches PREVIEW_READY); external read/verify only, no repo mutation, no sandbox worktree needed
lines.output_artifact: verification_verdict (PASS | PARTIAL | FAIL | BLOCKED_WITH_REASON) backed by edge receipt from the secondary CF account
lines.failure_behavior: Missing or unreachable edge receipt = verdict FAIL, never substituted by builder self-report; FAIL or deploy-truth drift writes a HOLD row blocking further line dispatch for the run (deploy_truth_hold semantics) until resolved. Never STOP the registry-wide lane
lines.notes: pass_rule: PASS only from secondary CF account edge receipt (account b7282b4a5c17b84d62e3ef8866b878f8, worker sina-governance-ssot-advisory) — never builder self-report (autonomy loop L3 law). Cloudflare tool_law defers CF to Phase 3/4 control plane: v0 uses ONLY the existing verifier worker read/verify path, no new CF control plane.

lines.name: Receipt Line
lines.input_source: all line receipts for the run + FL8 verification_verdict (event: line completion); writes only under receipts/factory/, no sandbox worktree needed
lines.output_artifact: receipt_chain: run receipt receipts/factory/<FR-ID>-run-<ISO8601Z>.json (schema factory_run_receipt_v0) + hash index over line receipts and artifacts
lines.failure_behavior: Receipt write failure is a line failure: retry-if-ROI-positive once -> unresolved files a repair candidate and escalates machine-first (L4 self-repair -> L6 deep research -> review queue; hygiene red never routes to founder — codified anti-pattern); run cannot reach CLOSED without a complete receipt chain; receipts and artifacts are NEVER deleted. Never STOP
lines.notes: Timestamps machine-generated (datetime.now(timezone.utc)), never typed. Every artifact gets sha256 recorded in its line receipt. Optional hash-chain mirror via the Supabase trustfield_loop_receipts pattern (Supabase is not yet a motor kind — registry amendment when built). Costs roll up: line receipt -> run receipt -> phase2 scorecard counters.cost_usd.

lines.name: Harvest Line
lines.input_source: completed run receipt_chain + receipts/factory/<FR-ID>/; read + queue-row drafting only, no sandbox worktree needed
lines.output_artifact: harvest_report: reusable-pattern candidates as rows for data/governance_library_promote_queue_v1.json + streak entries feeding L8 earned-autonomy expansion_rules
lines.failure_behavior: Harvest failure degrades: reduce scope -> provisional harvest notes tagged PROVISIONAL into the review queue -> retry-if-ROI-positive; run stays RECEIPTED, never regresses. Never STOP
founder_approval_points: promotion of harvested rows out of data/governance_library_promote_queue_v1.json
lines.notes: Consumes adjacent queues, never duplicates them (integration law F3): drafts candidate rows for data/governance_library_promote_queue_v1.json as artifacts under receipts/factory/artifacts/<FR-ID>/, delivered as branch + PR through full repo fences — never a direct data/ write (W2 wall; assist != authority; never_auto: promote_without_receipt). Feeds L8 receipt-streak counters. Autonomy widening happens only via expansion_rules receipt streaks, never chat approval.
